---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "N'hésitez pas à me contacter pour toute question ou opportunité de collaboration"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<div class="row g-5 mt-2">

<div class="col-md-6">

<h3 class="text-water mb-4">Coordonnées</h3>

<a href="mailto:ngastoncyrille@gmail.com" class="contact-card">
  <div class="contact-icon">✉</div>
  <div>
    <div class="contact-label">Email</div>
    <div class="contact-value">ngastoncyrille@gmail.com</div>
  </div>
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/gaston-cyrille-nebie-a2a977222" 
   target="_blank" class="contact-card">
  <div class="contact-icon">in</div>
  <div>
    <div class="contact-label">LinkedIn</div>
    <div class="contact-value">Gaston Cyrille NEBIE</div>
  </div>
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/ngastoncyrille" target="_blank" class="contact-card">
  <div class="contact-icon">⌥</div>
  <div>
    <div class="contact-label">GitHub</div>
    <div class="contact-value">ngastoncyrille</div>
  </div>
</a>

<a href="https://rpubs.com/nebiegc" target="_blank" class="contact-card">
  <div class="contact-icon">📊</div>
  <div>
    <div class="contact-label">RPubs</div>
    <div class="contact-value">rpubs.com/nebiegc</div>
  </div>
</a>

<div style="background:#112240;border:1px solid #1a3a6b;border-radius:0.65rem;padding:1.25rem;margin-top:1.5rem;">
  <div style="font-size:0.75rem;color:#48cae4;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
    💧 Association Hydro-Burkina
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:0.9rem;color:#90a8c0;">
    Vice-Président · Production et diffusion d'information sur l'eau et le climat en 
    Afrique de l'Ouest
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- /col -->

<div class="col-md-6">

<h3 class="text-water mb-4">Formulaire de contact</h3>

<div style="background:#112240;border:1px solid #1a3a6b;border-radius:0.75rem;padding:1.75rem;">

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/VOTRE_ID_FORMSPREE" method="POST">

  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <label style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#90a8c0;display:block;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">
      Nom complet
    </label>
    <input type="text" name="nom" required
           style="width:100%;padding:0.6rem 0.9rem;background:#0d1b2a;border:1px solid #1a3a6b;
                  border-radius:0.4rem;color:#cdd6f4;font-size:0.95rem;"
           placeholder="Votre nom">
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <label style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#90a8c0;display:block;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">
      Adresse email
    </label>
    <input type="email" name="email" required
           style="width:100%;padding:0.6rem 0.9rem;background:#0d1b2a;border:1px solid #1a3a6b;
                  border-radius:0.4rem;color:#cdd6f4;font-size:0.95rem;"
           placeholder="votre@email.com">
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <label style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#90a8c0;display:block;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">
      Sujet
    </label>
    <select name="sujet"
            style="width:100%;padding:0.6rem 0.9rem;background:#0d1b2a;border:1px solid #1a3a6b;
                   border-radius:0.4rem;color:#cdd6f4;font-size:0.95rem;">
      <option value="collaboration">Collaboration / Projet</option>
      <option value="consultation">Mission de consultation</option>
      <option value="formation">Formation / Renforcement de capacités</option>
      <option value="recherche">Recherche / Partenariat académique</option>
      <option value="autre">Autre</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
    <label style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#90a8c0;display:block;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">
      Message
    </label>
    <textarea name="message" required rows="5"
              style="width:100%;padding:0.6rem 0.9rem;background:#0d1b2a;border:1px solid #1a3a6b;
                     border-radius:0.4rem;color:#cdd6f4;font-size:0.95rem;resize:vertical;"
              placeholder="Décrivez votre demande..."></textarea>
  </div>

  <button type="submit" 
          style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;background:#0077b6;border:none;border-radius:0.4rem;
                 color:white;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;
                 transition:background 0.2s;"
          onmouseover="this.style.background='#00b4d8'"
          onmouseout="this.style.background='#0077b6'">
    Envoyer le message
  </button>

</form>

<p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#5a7090;margin-top:1rem;text-align:center;">
  ⚡ Alimenté par Formspree · Réponse sous 48h
</p>

</div>

</div><!-- /col -->

</div><!-- /row -->

---

<div class="text-center mt-4" style="padding:2rem;">
  <p class="text-muted-blue" style="font-size:0.85rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;">
    Localisation actuelle
  </p>
  <p style="font-size:1.1rem;color:#90e0ef;font-weight:500;">
    🇧🇪 Liège, Belgique &nbsp;/&nbsp; 🇧🇫 Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso
  </p>
  <p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:#7090a0;">
    Disponible pour des missions en présentiel ou à distance
  </p>
</div>
